## Feedback

What's working well, what's confusing, or what you think could be improved.

## Context

- Which part of the framework does this relate to?
- How long have you been using GAAI?
- Which AI tool are you using?

---

*Note: GAAI uses a Fork & Own model. Feature requests and new skills are best implemented in your own fork. See [Fork & Own](https://github.com/gaai-framework/gaai-framework/blob/main/docs/contributing/fork-and-own.md).*
